name: Verify G+
description: Measures general cognitive ability including numerical, verbal and inductive reasoning. Suitable for all professional and managerial roles.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to understand and apply numerical concepts and data presented in charts and tables.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to evaluate and draw inferences from written passages and verbal information.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and relationships in abstract visual information.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from given information and rules.

name: Verify Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy of checking and comparing information.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Measures basic numerical calculation skills for clerical and administrative roles.

name: Numerical Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level numerical reasoning assessment.

name: Verbal Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level verbal reasoning assessment.

name: Management and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB) - Numerical
description: Advanced numerical reasoning for management and graduate roles.

name: Management and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB) - Verbal
description: Advanced verbal reasoning for management and graduate roles.

name: Critical Reasoning Test Battery (CRTB2) - Numerical
description: Critical numerical reasoning for professional and managerial candidates.

name: Critical Reasoning Test Battery (CRTB2) - Verbal
description: Critical verbal reasoning for professional and managerial candidates.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire normative version. Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work performance including relationships, thinking style and feelings and emotions.

name: OPQ32n
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire normative version measuring 32 workplace personality characteristics.

name: MQ (Motivational Questionnaire)
description: Measures motivational factors that energise and drive individual performance at work. Assesses energy and dynamism, synergy, and intrinsic motivation.

name: AI Skills
description: Assesses an individual's readiness and aptitude for working with AI tools and technologies in the workplace.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Comprehensive development report combining multiple assessment types for talent development.

name: Work Strengths
description: Identifies individual strengths relevant to workplace performance and engagement.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Situational judgement test measuring preferred approaches to customer service interactions.

name: Graduate Situational Judgement Test
description: Situational judgement test assessing graduate candidates on workplace scenarios.

name: Manager Situational Judgement Test
description: Situational judgement test measuring managerial decision-making and people management effectiveness.

name: Sales Situational Judgement Test
description: Situational judgement test for sales roles measuring customer interaction and deal management skills.

name: Automata (New)
description: Live coding simulation that presents real-world programming tasks and measures code quality and problem solving.

name: Automata - Fix (New)
description: Live coding simulation where candidates fix broken code, measuring debugging skills and code comprehension.

name: Automata - SQL (New)
description: Live SQL coding simulation measuring database query writing skills in a realistic environment.

name: Accounts Payable Simulation (New)
description: Simulation measuring accounts payable processing skills and accuracy in a realistic work environment.

name: Accounts Receivable Simulation (New)
description: Simulation measuring accounts receivable skills including invoice processing and collections.

name: Assessment and Development Center Exercises
description: Suite of assessment center exercises including inbox exercises, role plays, group discussions and presentations.
